title: Waypoint Rail Navigator
prompt:
Create a production-ready Waypoint Rail Navigator using React, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion. Build a compact three-stop route navigator where selecting Brief, Review, or Release moves a coral waypoint along a vertical rail and reveals a one-line destination description. Present it as a light Bento surface: #F4F5F6 background, white panel, #ECECEE border, 22px radius, soft neutral shadow, #111111 type, and #4A4A4F secondary copy. Coral is the only bright accent. Do not use gradients on the card, floating overlays, or a route meaning that relies only on the moving dot.

Use a labelled navigation landmark and three native buttons with aria-current set to page for the selected stop. Each control needs a minimum 44px target, a visible 3px dark focus ring, and normal Enter and Space support. Hover may lift the selected target 2px in 180ms; press may compress it 1px in 90ms. Move the waypoint with a spring at stiffness 340 and damping 27, then fade the destination copy over 160ms. A polite live region must announce the selected route. Keep all behavior in local state, with no timers, random values, storage, remote content, or network calls.

At 320px, keep labels and the rail readable in a single column; on larger previews, preserve the concise route composition. Maintain logical tab order and AA contrast. Prefer transform and opacity, and use an immediate state update or a 120ms fade when prefers-reduced-motion is enabled. Return full TypeScript React client code plus a runnable pure CSS approximation with suggested HTML.

code.css:
/* Suggested HTML: <nav class="uiwiki-waypoint"><button aria-current="page">Brief</button></nav> */
.uiwiki-waypoint{max-width:340px;padding:20px;border:1px solid #ececee;border-left:2px solid #ececee;border-radius:22px;background:#fff}.uiwiki-waypoint button{display:block;min-height:44px;width:100%;padding:8px 12px;border:0;border-radius:12px;background:#fff;text-align:left;font-weight:800;transition:transform 180ms ease}.uiwiki-waypoint button[aria-current="page"]{border-left:4px solid #f97316}.uiwiki-waypoint button:hover{transform:translateY(-2px)}.uiwiki-waypoint button:focus-visible{outline:3px solid #111;outline-offset:3px}@media(prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){.uiwiki-waypoint button{transition:none}}
